Thuisbezorgd.text:
Extremely disappointing experience.
The delivery time was initially set to 20:02, then pushed to 20:50 only after I requested an update, and the order finally arrived at 21:35. That’s over 1.5 hours delay.
During this time, I tried contacting the restaurant multiple times with no answer. I also requested cancellation before delivery due to the excessive delay, but this was ignored.
What’s even worse is the customer service. Instead of addressing the issue properly, I received generic responses and a complete refusal to refund, even though the service was clearly not delivered within a reasonable timeframe.
This is not just about a delay, it’s about poor handling of the situation and lack of accountability.
I will not be using this platform again.

Restaurants participating in offers with their own couriers are exploiting customers. Waited for 2 hours for an order that was supposed to come in 45 mins for it to not even be delivered . Spent 1 hour chatting with customer support and them assuring that the delivery is on its way and it’ll be delivered but the courier never showed up. The time to delivery kept changing , the courier even fake messaged that he’s here and disabled the chat immediately upon calling the restaurant and even mentioning the name of the courier driver they back out saying that talk to the app. Extremely frustrating and disappointing experience from Mima west and Thuisbezorgd.

Horrible experience, will never order from this app again. I ordered at 8PM and my order arrived at 10PM, cold food and soaked from the drink as it spilled, I ended up throwing all the food away and when I tried to contact the company I kept getting a bot. When I finally managed to speak to a representative on Facebook Messenger (the next day), they acknowledged the whole thing but only offered a small amount as a refund. Unacceptable from my side, would have appreciated a full-refund as I threw all the food away.
These people are so shit. This is an example of a useless company skimming off the hardworking person. They can’t even deliver a basic service that I would expect from a shanty town in South Africa

Update: after Roos sent me this message below, I still got the same response nothing was resolved. I now filled a formal complaint with the Dutch consumer authority and I would recommend those that have multiple complaints and evidence of no delivery and no solution with thuisbezorgd to do the same.

Ordered from McDonald's Almere Centrum through Thuisbezorgd. The courier never rang the doorbell, never called. I was home the entire time. Later I received an email saying nobody answered and that the order was left at the door. Unfortunately, nothing was there.
Customer support refused a refund and closed the case without providing any delivery proof (call logs or photo of delivery).I even offered ringcam recording and call logs to show maybe the delivery guy got the wrong house, however they refused. I was left with nothing and loss of money. Very disappointing handling of the situation and unfortunately not the first time.

Are you kidding me? I paid 10 euros for a menu that is missing the burger and you are refunding me with 1,4?? So I paid 8,6 for fries and 2 pieces of chicken tenders?? Is this normal for you customer service employee named Akshara?

Thuisbezorgd lures customers into their app with promises of many coupons which give a hefty discount on meals. None of them work, ever. Voucher application terms are nowhere to be found on their website, so i contacted customer support, which was very difficult to find, I had to dig on google, and explained my situation kindly to maybe fix this issue. Now more than a month further i'm still waiting. Worthless support!

If you see any of their coupons used as as AD campaign, don't trust it, just go to competition with an actual support service.

The order was marked as delivered, but I never received it. I saw the courier arrive at my address, and a moment later the map disappeared and the order was marked as delivered. However, there was no food and nothing was left at my door.

I paid €30 only to end up still hungry before work and now I have to wait several days for a refund (if they even return the money). This is unacceptable service. Situations like this make it very hard to trust the platform, especially when couriers can mark orders as delivered without actually handing them over.

I hope consequences will be taken regarding the courier who marked the order as delivered while being at my address.

It's insane how clueless and utterly incapable the delivery drivers are. Out of the last 10 times I ordered something 8 times it went wrong. They don't speak dutch and their english is not on a level that they understand directions.
since you can't read reviews anymore its a messed up company. where possible I am gonna order food from the resto own website instead

Order never arrived, but marked as delivered. They claim that the delivery person ringed the bell, tried to reach me via chat and phone, but none of these happened. I also went to my front door immediately when the app notified that they left the order there, but there was nothing at all.

Customer service took 1,5 hours to reply, but just sent the a generic message that since they think it was delivered, they won't even issue a refund. I explained it again and again, and they had the audacity to just repeat the same canned message 3 times with just a slightly different wording. It's clear that this is internal policy, not just one support employee being unhelpful.
DISGUSTING COMPANY!

Hello,
My order is marked as delivered, but I did not receive anything.
The restaurant was closed and no delivery arrived.
Please refund the full amount to my original payment method.

Order number: G4R8GQ
Date: 18 February
Time: 04:23
Restaurant: The Burgery

Thank you.

I am a client for years from a restaurant that I trust, never had problems because they had ther own deluvery giys.
Now they have to rely on thuisbezorgd delivery people which I have already made an ethical complaint.
Yesterday I made an order, got a message of delivered, never was, I was going to call the restaurant and I got a message saying the order was cancelled, I called the restaurant, he was also confused so I decided to order again.
This time I was tracking my order, I see the delivery man in a building 200 meters from mine sending me messages saying he was at my door, but somehow I could not answer, so he put the food back in his scooter and leaves and again the app say it was delivered.
A few problems I have with this situation. First the delivery guys don't know how to read addresses, second they say they delivered something they never did, 3rd not even the restaurant knows they didn't delivered and what happened with the food this 2 times?
Not just I lost the order from the 2 that day, my kids were waiting since 18:30 to 21:00, and I had to order from another platform. So I spent 3 times the money because of thuisbezorgd.
Moreover there's no way for you to actually contact thuisbezorgd directly. You can talk to a chatbot and receive automated emails.
I had to call 5 times the restaurant yesterday and today, because I don't want the restaurant to have problems because it's not their fault to solve this situation because thuisbezorgd if the restaurant didn't call them they would not have given my money back.
Just so it is clear I made a formal ethics complaint.
And I will also be filling a complaint in Autoriteit Consument & Markt (ACM).
Not just because of the behaviour of the employees, the lack of clarity, the difficulty to enter in contact or make a complaint but also for the unnecessary problems they caused to a person that can't walk due to an accident and have a child that needs to eat.
It is unacceptable the behaviour.
The food never arrived. Thuisbezorgd offers only AI generated chat and email. No support. No way to get the money back. Disgraceful.

Good afternoon, my opinion of this company in the Uden area is that it is a disgrace. Their customer service is the worst there is. They deliver orders late, they do not refund money immediately, and if you do not complain about the money, they do nothing and do not refund it. On the other hand, they make up excuses for refunding money. Such as vouchers, which can only be obtained after 24 hours, and the money is only refunded after a week. It's a disgrace. And on top of that, I've been waiting for the money for 3 or 4 weeks. It's all very unfortunate.
To be honest no so good. I was have bad experience and I will not work with them. But food was not bad. That's why 3 stars for this company.

Reviews are no longer visible to read, useless now.

@edit
Stop with those dumb responses that means nothing.

Another one... "ScOre iS tHe aVerAge" xD Nobody care about stars, it's not what people write about their experiences. It's really low to still response with this joke text.

First time I ordered food from Thuisbezorgd and waited for 3h. Later I found out that restaurant that took my order through the app was completely closed on that day.
Another time I ordered food from a snackbar and also waited more than two hours. When I called the restaurant they told me they don’t even deliver in my area which the app didn’t mention at all and of course charged me.
The chat bot available on the app is so useless it doesn’t say anything except three messages you can’t even find any contact information when anything happens

worst customer service ever.
no way to contact service team, the chatbot is irritatingly robotic. the deliver time keeps increasing. when i called the restaurant, they said till thuisbezorgd finds a driver the order cant be started. why the f would you take my money when you cant find a rider. deleting the account

For several days, I was unable to reach anyone regarding an order that was never delivered. This caused a significant inconvenience, especially considering that I am a regular Thuisbezorgd customer with frequent weekly orders.

After over 1 week from the issue, I got the refund and a 10% voucher on the next order, with a validity of 1 week.

For an issue of this scale — a non-delivered order, delayed support, and lack of timely communication — I expected more appropriate compensation, both in value and in a reasonable validity period. The current resolution is disappointing and does not reflect the level of service I would expect as a loyal customer.

I sent them another email on this, and their answer =>
"We are sorry to hear that understand that you wish to see a solution for this.

We apologize for the inconvenience, but we are unable to offer any further compensation."

Note that I wasn't able to use ANY compensation on this!

Uber Eats.text: Absolute worst customer service and uber eats is exceptionally unethical.

Ordered 2 meals meal from Pepes worth around 30 pounds. Half of my food order was missing (two portions of fries). Only got £0.54 refund. This is a robbery. You also cannot contact or speak to a human anymore so this "service" is becoming more and more of a ripoff for customers.

Not difficult to get orders correct. From start to finish. Apparently it is. Many times issues. Cold food. Incorrect. Delivered wrong house. Restaurant not reading note/s. Deliver driver not following instructions. Etc etc.
Customer service response poor. Credits which need to be used in short time.
Second time cancelling account now from last few years.

I decided to try driving for UberEats as a side hustle. Today I drove 82 miles, spent 3 & 1/2 hrs driving and made $38. WTH?

One trip was 33 miles 1-way. All for peanut pay. I then had to drive 27 miles back to my place.

Save your time and your gas. Not worth driving for them at all. You'd make more money working at McDonald's for minimum wage - and no gas expenses or wear and tear on your car.

I just ordered a new york cheesecake blizzard ice cream for Dairy Queen through Uber eats. After I placed order it showed me it will be delivered up to 29mins. 2mins later changed to up to 1,10 hr. I would never agreed to wait for an ice cream that long. My order arrived 51mins after placing order. Of course my order is all melted. Contacted Uber eats and they don't want to solve this issue. Said its nonrefundable.

ZERO stars!!!!! Awful drivers and customer service agents, IF you get to a person i stead of an AI chatbot. Deliveries take over an hour even if paying for priority delivery. Without priority at least 90+ minutes. Food arrives cold, food gets shifted or tiled and makes a mess. If you are missing anything they won’t give a refund. They wait 24 hours to respond and ask for a copy of the order items and order receipt, which many don’t come with a receipt. How does that prove anything???

Had a very bad experience today. Ordered grocery items and I needed them badly! Waited 2 hours and the shopper took 2 hours to get 3 items lol then he cancelled the order. When I reached their customer service all they could say was sorry for the inconvenience and they explained that the store closed. Apparently 2 hours is not enough for shopper to find 5 items! What a joke!

Absolutely shocking experience. During delivery the agents will talk to you and say everything will be fine but if it’s not then contact us again and we will help. After delivery there is no help. Uber Eats need to be put to the sword. They are Sh&t beyond understanding. Nobody within the company has any care or concern apart from receiving income. PLEASE BOYCOTT THEM. Companies are suffering to as it’s not the suppliers fault it’s the transport service.
Canceling my order after 2 h waiting and I can't cancel my membership? WTF

⭐ 1 Star — Would Give Zero If I Could

This review is based solely on my personal experience with Uber Eats. I was charged a $50.75 cancellation fee for a business lunch order from CAVA on February 3, 2026, at 12:19 p.m., which I canceled after an unreasonably and unusually long wait time in my opinion and a lack of clear updates about the order status. An hour after placing the order, the app still showed “order is being prepared” with a delivery time of 1:55 p.m. This was much longer than what I had previously experienced when ordering from the same restaurant also through Uber Eats.

I tried to get reassurance from both Uber Eats and CAVA. Uber Eats advised me to call the restaurant, but CAVA was unreachable. With no communication and a time‑sensitive business lunch approaching, I canceled the order through Uber Help. I found out later that a $50.75 cancellation fee had been applied.

Although I successfully disputed the charge with my credit card company, the amount continued to appear as outstanding on my Uber Eats account. I attempted several times to contest it through the app to no avail. I also did NOT find any customer hotline or email address where I could escalate my complaint. There was no clear way to reach anyone else for support.

In the end, I paid the fee to protect my credit standing. After this experience, I stopped using Uber Eats and switched to DoorDash, which had been far more reliable for me.

I'm am sick and tyred of drivers
Taking a job the canceling it.
There's absolutely no way to contact
This company when it happens.
Bad customer services

One of the worst companies ever. I don’t even know how the government allowing them to do that. Food arrived missing 2 items, this is the 3rd time for this to happen and when I contacted support, the chat system said we can’t refund. The driver is not even the one in the photo and you can’t even contact the driver. A complete scam
They cheat you on your order, change your order without consent and refuse to refund

There were missing items from my order & there is no way of reporting a complaint or getting a refund through the app or Help line - they block you through the process. This is not the first time I have had issue with Uber - another missing item order or they either charge you on a ride for waiting time, when the actually waiting is the customer & not the driver. I don't think it is Uber themselves - yet the people who work for them -they are not trustworthy & know how to play with the app processing. I actually managed to get a refund in that instance (Uber were helpful), yet now there is a change to the app help system. Trying to report an issue where you are no way at fault, there is absolutely no way of getting through to support .
Perhaps they should consider what poor staff & customer service does in the long run!!
Not happy with the service ordered my food it came cold told uber eats all they did was apologise admit their mistake and did not refund me. RIpp OFf AVoid THEM CHEAPER TO GO DIRECTLY TO THE SHOPS

Wow, think I will have to close this account. Been a one member for years. Ordered macdonalds. Order ready but drivers are not coming. Now the food is there for an hour and they have just said a driver on the way. Don’t know the state of the food and can’t go and get something as they refuse to cancel the order . Time to say goodbye. Cars only from now on!
So bad. Food always arrived cold. Drivers cancel all the time and the customer service team literally don’t care. Will stick to Deliveroo as never have any issues with them

After using the service for years today I have cancelled my membership and moved to another service. The customer service and ai responses are sub par. I have seen better more compressive customer service bots from local firms. Refused a phone call.

O woukd give ut a zero out if 5but it eouldnt let me. I ordered a meal immediately after i realized i waa the wrong address no more then 5 secinds i cancelled to reordee with the right address they chsrged me 33 dollars. Unbeleivable no way the order had been started. Rediculous

Scam. Bought a gift card and messing me around when I try to redeem it, no help from customer services at all. About to delete my account and just give the gift card away, jumped through a dozen hoops saying I could redeem card after first adding my number then once I did that it was something else, then something else, and now my details are stuck at not being verified for a week and customer services firstly closed my help thread when I contacted initially and now getting no reply at all from them. Steer clear and don't bother with their gift cards, seems like a scam so you give up trying to redeem it. Use just eat or food hub instead
